title: Some Republicans Vent Concern as Party Backs Trump’s Iran Threat
summary_full: Senator Ron Johnson said he hoped President Trump was making empty threats, but most in the G.O.P. cheered his warning that Iran’s “whole civilization” would be wiped out.
summary_public: Senator Ron Johnson said he hoped President Trump was making empty threats, but most in the G.O.P. cheered his warning that Iran’s “whole civilization” would be wiped out.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: warning that Iran’s “whole civilization” would be wiped out.
